channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Sony announces The Playerbase, 'a unique opportunity for PlayStation’s biggest fans' to be scanned into a PlayStation Studios game, starting with Gran Turismo 7
item.description: Sony has announced The Playerbase, a new initiative offering devoted PlayStation fans the chance to be scanned into a PlayStation Studios game.

item.title: Trump’s Congratulatory Call With the Artemis 2 Astronauts Was Painfully Awkward
item.description: Four astronauts flew around the Moon and all they got was this lousy phone call with the president.

item.title: AI-RAN is redefining enterprise edge intelligence and autonomy
item.description: Presented by Booz Allen AI-RAN, or artificial intelligence radio area networks, is a reimagining of what wireless infrastructure can do. Rather than treating the network as a passive conduit for data, AI-RAN turns it into an active computational layer. It's a sensor, a compute fabric, and a control plane for physical operations, all rolled into one. That shift has huge implications for industries from manufacturing and logistics to healthcare and smart infrastructure.VentureBeat spoke with two leaders at the center of this transformation: Chris Christou, senior vice president at Booz Allen, an...

item.title: Cette image virale de la Terre est déjà historique… et Apollo n’aurait jamais pu la prendre !
item.description: Pris par le commandant de la mission Artemis II, Reid Wiseman, ce cliché dévoile la Terre sous un angle inédit. L’image fascine autant qu’elle dérange. Mais derrière cette prouesse technique, une évidence : nos voyages vers la Lune entrent dans une nouvelle ère.

item.title: Artemis II : les astronautes photographient la Terre avec un iPhone 17 Pro Max
item.description: La mission Artemis II documente son voyage avec des clichés inédits de notre planète bleue. Si le public s'attendait à des images capturées par un équipement complexe ou de lourds boîtiers professionnels, certaines images partagées par l'agence spatiale américaine ont été prises avec un iPhone 17 Pro Max.

item.title: Sony is starting a weird service that scans people to put them in PlayStation games
item.description: Sony just announced a truly strange initiative called The Playerbase. This is a program to scan people's likenesses and pop them in PlayStation games. That's pretty wild, but potentially cool to those who have always wanted to become a weird humanoid version of Crash Bandicoot. The program is ramping up slowly. Sony has announced a contest of sorts to place one lucky fan inside of Gran Turismo 7, though in a reduced fashion. The chosen player will get an image of their face placed inside the game as a character portrait and will get the chance to design a logo and the exterior of a vehicle. So...

item.title: Where the Hell Do You Even Put the Popcorn in Disney’s Sail Barge Bucket?
item.description: The Disney parks are once again going all out for 'Star Wars' Day, by which we mean committing to popcorn-based madness.

item.title: As models converge, the enterprise edge in AI shifts to governed data and the platforms that control it
item.description: Presented by BoxAs frontier models converge, the advantage in enterprise AI is moving away from the model and toward the data it can safely access. For most enterprises, that advantage lives in unstructured data: the contracts, case files, product specifications, and internal knowledge. For enterprise leaders, the question is no longer which model to use, but which platform governs the content those models are allowed to reason over."It's not what the model does anymore, it's the enterprise's own unstructured data – their content, how it's organized, how it's governed, and how it's made access...

item.title: OpenAI says AI could mean a 4-day week ‘with no loss in pay’ — but warns jobs and wealth are at risk
item.description: OpenAI says AI could bring a four-day week — but only if governments reshape the economy to share the gains

item.title: Counter-Strike 2 : la dernière mise à jour change radicalement le jeu
item.description: Disponible en bêta, la mise à jour de Counter-Strike 2 datée du 2 avril 2026 modifie le titre en profondeur. Avec notamment un tout nouveau système d'animation.

item.title: 'I was not bluffing Microsoft, and I'm doing it again': apparently disgruntled researcher leaks worrying Windows zero-day security flaw
item.description: Researchers confirm the bug works, while Microsoft gives a bland statement.

item.title: This Is Supposedly the Final, Final, FINAL Look of the Foldable iPhone
item.description: Maybe. Supposedly. Reportedly.

item.title: 'This is the most difficult thing I’ve ever done': inside Disney’s wildest animation challenge yet
item.description: Gary pushed Disney to build entirely new animation tech

item.title: I tried a sub-$50 pair of ANC headphones — can you really get quality at such a low price?
item.description: I spent a week testing the Tribit QuietPlus 81 headphones, and although they’re exceptionally cheap, they don’t necessarily offer great value.

item.title: Votre voiture a plus de 8 ans ? Citroën vous offre jusqu’à 6 000 € de reprise
item.description: Pour se redonner un coup de fouet dans un marché automobile qui patine, Citroën propose une prime à la reprise pouvant aller jusqu’à 6 000 €. La marque française reprendra ainsi tout véhicule âgé de plus de 8 ans, quelle que soit sa marque.

item.title: Most companies start PR too late
item.description: The companies that benefit most from big moments started building visibility long before the moment arrived. I’ve heard it too many times to count, “We’ve never done PR before and are getting ready to announce [insert your major milestone of choice]”

item.title: Scientists Watch Brain’s Self-Cleaning Process During Sleep in Real Time
item.description: It turns out your brain fluid swishes around with more “bidirectionality” to clean up while you sleep.

item.title: Gemini se met à jour pour mieux prendre soin de votre santé mentale
item.description: Google apporte quelques changements à l'IA Gemini. Ils visent une meilleure prise en charge des questions liées à la santé mentale des utilisateurs.

item.title: NASA shares incredible photos from the far side of the Moon
item.description: The Artemis II crew made history as they traveled further from our planet than any other living humans. The astronauts and NASA are making the most of the trip, including by capturing some utterly stunning photos. The space agency shared some that were taken from the far side of the Moon, including the "Earthset" shown above.This is a depiction of our planet setting behind the Moon, just as the sun sets over the horizon for us on terra firma every single night. "The image is reminiscent of the iconic Earthrise image taken by astronaut Bill Anders 58 years earlier as the Apollo 8 crew flew arou...

item.title: Malgré l’arrivée du Nothing Phone (4a) Pro, le (3a) Pro vaut encore le détour, surtout à moins de 350 € (mais il faut se dépêcher)
item.description: Certes, le Nothing Phone (3a) Pro n'est pas le smartphone le plus récent de la marque au Glyph. Mais ce smartphone au design inimitable et très doué en photo est encore recommandable, surtout quand son prix passe de 479 euros à 349,90 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Iraq Telegram ban triggers 1,200% VPN surge — but experts issue a stark security warning
item.description: A government block on Telegram in Iraq has triggered a massive 1,200% surge in Proton VPN sign-ups as citizens look for workarounds. The company now warns residents against downloading sketchy apps that could put their data in danger.

item.title: ‘No Data Centers’ Sign Found After Shooting at Indianapolis Politician’s Home
item.description: The city councilor has been steadfast in his insistence on new data center construction in the area.

item.title: First photos of solar eclipse from Artemis II crew look almost too good to be real
item.description: The Artemis II astronauts have already captured some incredible sights of the Earth and Moon during their journey. Now we can add a new visual to that list: a total solar eclipse as seen from deep space. It looks almost too perfect; the Moon has crisp, but uneven edges, while bright stars dot the area […]

item.title: This special code saves you a massive $150 off 64GB of G.SKILL Flare X Series DDR5 6000 RAM
item.description: Use this code to save $150 on 64GB of super-fast G.SKILL Flare X DDR5-6000 RAM — at under $750 that's a solid saving.

item.title: Game Pass en avril 2026 : Replaced, Hades II, Oblivion Remastered… voici la première vague de jeux du mois
item.description: Microsoft vient de dévoiler la première vague du Game Pass pour le mois d'avril et on compte déjà plus d'une quinzaine de titres ! Voici ce que propose cette belle sélection.

item.title: A teenage Minecraft YouTuber raised $1,234,567 for a meme prediction market called Giggles. It broke me.
item.description: Justin Jin’s company Giggles – which he describes as “putting a trading app and TikTok together” – started as a joke.

item.title: Instagram : comment créer un montage de plusieurs photos en story
item.description: Si vous souhaitez agrémenter votre story Instagram avec plusieurs images, il existe désormais un mode « Composition ». Voici comment l'utiliser pour faire des collages photo Instagram.

item.title: ‘Dark Matter’ Season 2 Sees Joel Edgerton Forced Back Into the Multiverse
item.description: Jennifer Connelly, Alice Braga, Jimmi Simpson, Dayo Okeniyi, Oakes Fegley, and Amanda Brugel also star in the Apple TV sci-fi series, which returns August 28.

item.title: Is Trump’s threat to blow up Iran’s infrastructure a war crime? Experts weigh in
item.description: Experts in military law say Trump’s wide-ranging threats to destroy bridges and power plants could be considered a war crime. In his news conference Monday, President Donald Trump threatened to blow up every bridge and power plant in Iran, action that would be so far-reaching that some experts in military law said it could constitute a war crime.The issue could turn on whether the power plants were legitimate military targets, whether the attacks were proportional compared with what Iran has done and whether civilian casualties were minimized.Trump’s threat was so broad it did not seem to acco...

item.title: Asus’ lightweight 16-inch laptop is a formidable MacBook Air alternative
item.description: I already put Asus' new Zenbook A16 through the wringer when I brought a pre-production unit with me to CES. I loved it for its ample power in an impressively light 16-inch chassis. It's speedy enough for part-time content creation, it's got lengthy battery life, and its large OLED screen is crisp and vivid. Now, […]

item.title: Apple’s sci-fi thriller Dark Matter is back in August
item.description: Over the last few years summer has turned out to be a great time for new streaming sci-fi, and 2026 is shaping up to be much the same. Apple just announced that its multiversal thriller Dark Matter is coming back for its second season, which will start streaming on August 28th. Season 2 will span […]

item.title: 4 days left to save close to $500 on TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 passes
item.description: 4 days left to save up to $482 on your TechCrunch disrupt 2026 ticket. These low rates will disappear on April 10 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register here.

item.title: Star Wars Day 2026 is right around the corner — and this 'distinctive collectible' is a must-buy for the Force user in your life
item.description: In a world exclusive, TechRadar can reveal one of this year's must-buy items from Star Wars Day 2026's merch range.

item.title: ASUS ZenBook A16 review: A surprisingly light and powerful 16-inch ultraportable
item.description: I went into 2025 incredibly amped to review ASUS's 2.2-pound ZenBook A14, only to be disappointed by the lackluster performance of its Snapdragon X chip. I'm still a bit heartbroken, to be honest. But now ASUS is back with a revamped A14 and a larger 16-inch ZenBook A16, both of which sport new Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme chips. The A16 is slightly heavier at 2.6 pounds and 2.9 pounds, but it still competes with LG’s Gram Pro 16. And thanks to Qualcomm's new hardware, it's actually speedy enough to compete with Intel and AMD ultraportables. Take everything I initially liked about the ZenBook ...

item.title: Job listings for this tech job are spiking amid AI layoff fears
item.description: A new report shows that tech companies are looking to hire more in this role, with listings climbing 30% this year. Whether you’re doomscrolling on LinkedIn or talking to friends, AI-induced job loss anxiety feels inescapable right now. As companies go full throttle on investing in automation tools, the fear that entire roles can be instantly eliminated feels very real. After the surge in economic activity and tech adoption during the pandemic, tech companies issued mass layoffs after over-expanding. That trend continued in the last few months, with tech giants like Amazon and Oracle laying of...

item.title: Fini le gâchis : ces forfaits mobiles à partir de 4,99 €/mois révolutionnent votre facture mobile [Sponso]
item.description: Stop aux forfaits mobiles surcalibrés et trop chers. Prixtel allie générosité et souplesse avec son offre Oxygène à 6,99 euros par mois, dotée de 120 Go de data extensibles jusqu’à 160 Go.

item.title: Test du Asus Zenbook A16 (2026) : le Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme impressionne
item.description: Qualcomm n'a pas abandonné : avec l'Asus Zenbook A16 de 2026, le constructeur sort son meilleur SoC en exclusivité. Le Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme est enfin passé dans notre labo.

item.title: Artemis II : la NASA dévoile les photos du survol historique de la Lune
item.description: Cette nuit, quatre astronautes sont devenus les humains les plus éloignés de notre planète (406 773 km). La NASA vient de publier les images haute définition de ce périple sur la face cachée, et le spectacle est à couper le souffle.

item.title: Trump administration plans to cut cybersecurity agency’s budget by $700 million
item.description: The budget proposal would force CISA to operate with a significantly lower budget than previous years, citing the government's claims that the election misinformation programs were used to "target the President."

item.title: 500 km d’autonomie en 5 min : pourquoi BMW ne croit pas à la charge éclair de BYD
item.description: Avec le « Flash Charging », BYD a pris tout le monde de court en proposant une recharge ultra rapide pour ses futures voitures électriques. Mais BMW se méfie des conséquences engendrées par un ravitaillement éclair.

item.title: Astronomers Found the Closest Thing Yet to the Universe’s First Stars
item.description: The pristine star formed outside the Milky Way and later drifted into our galaxy.

item.title: Le Xiaomi C85 casse le marché de l’entrée de gamme grâce à cette remise de près de 40 %
item.description: Le Xiaomi Poco C85 avec 256 Go de stcokage perd presque 75 euros sur son prix grâce à cette offre Amazon et prend une place de choix sur le marché de l'entrée de gamme

item.title: These heat pumps can be installed in an hour—and will cut costs in half
item.description: Merino Energy, a new startup led by a former Apple designer, created a lower-cost heat pump that launched today. Five years ago, while working at Apple as a product designer, Mary Ann Rau decided to electrify her house and move away from fossil fuels. She installed solar, a battery, an induction range, and owned an EV. But there was still one big challenge: her HVAC system. “When it came to heat pumps, I was shocked when I got a quote for $40,000 to install heat pumps in my own house,” Rau says....

item.title: 50 000 visiteurs, 600 intervenants : Frandroid sera au salon GO Entrepreneurs Paris 2026
item.description: Rendez-vous les 15 et 16 avril 2026 à Paris La Défense Arena pour la 33e édition de GO Entrepreneurs. Au menu : 50 000 visiteurs, une scène de speakers impressionnante venue de toute la tech française, et Frandroid en partenaire média, rôle qu'on partage avec nos confrères de Numerama, également de la partie.

item.title: Amazfit Cheetah 2 Pro : une nouvelle montre de running aperçue au poignet d’un champion
item.description: À l'occasion du semi-marathon de Berlin, le coureur allemand Amanal Petros portait une nouvelle montre de sport d'Amazfit, sans doute la future Cheetah 2 Pro.

item.title: Mars : un rover de la Nasa a découvert un indice dans le lit d’une ancienne rivière qui relance la question la plus folle
item.description: Toujours à la recherche de traces de vie ancienne dans le cratère de Jezero, le rover Perseverance de la Nasa a récemment examiné une roche martienne qui a beaucoup intrigué les chercheurs. Ce qu'elle contient pourrait représenter un indice en faveur de l'existence de biosignatures.

item.title: Face aux redevances massives de l’H.264, l’AV1 offre une alternative libre et plus efficace
item.description: Connu des plateformes de streaming, le codec vidéo H.264 change ses règles financières. Avec une redevance pouvant atteindre 4,5 millions de dollars pour de nouveaux acteurs du streaming, il offre un boulevard à l’AV1. Un codec libre soutenu par le français VideoLAN.

item.title: Semaine de 32 h, confinement, redistribution des richesses… OpenAI dévoile son plan contre les menaces de l’IA
item.description: À travers un document publié en ligne, OpenAI alerte sur de nouvelles formes de cyberattaques et la création d'armes biologiques à l’aide de l’IA. Il est également question de mesures à appliquer dans le monde du travail. Ce rapport sort dans un contexte bien particulier pour OpenAI.

item.title: Sorry kid, drones are for war now
item.description: What happens when DJI, the world's leading maker of drones, is no longer welcome in the United States? You might think other dronemakers would see a huge opportunity with their competitor out of the picture. That didn't happen. In the 15 months since the United States triggered an automatic ban on future DJI products, no […]

item.title: 'Cringe' XO, Kitty season 3 is a total letdown — stream this heartwarming underrated Netflix teen drama instead
item.description: I couldn't be more disappointed by XO, Kitty season 3 and its ending — so take my advice and stream Netflix's best teen drama to date instead.

item.title: Apples iPhone Fold launch might happen later than we thought. Here’s why.
item.description: Apple's iPhone Fold might be late due to engineering issues Apple has encountered, new report says.

item.title: Comment Intel compte utiliser l’IA pour diviser le poids de vos jeux PC par 18
item.description: L'inflation de la mémoire vidéo réclamée par les derniers blockbusters vous donne des sueurs froides ? Intel dégaine une parade logicielle redoutable : le TSNC. Cette nouvelle technologie de compression neuronale promet de faire fondre la taille des textures jusqu'à 18 fois, sauvant ainsi l'espace de votre SSD et la VRAM de votre carte graphique.

item.title: Meilleures montres connectées 2026 : polyvalentes ou sportives, notre sélection
item.description: Vous voulez craquer sur une smartwatch ? Galaxy Watch, Pixel Watch, Apple Watch, Garmin ou encore Withings. Voici notre sélection des meilleures montres connectées testées par notre rédaction pour accompagner votre smartphone Android ou votre iPhone.

item.title: Box 5G à la maison : le comparatif des meilleurs forfaits chez Free, SFR, Orange et Bouygues Telecom
item.description: On peut avoir une mauvaise connexion fibre chez soi, et même pas du tout, mais un bon réseau mobile. C'est un des cas de figure où les box internet en 4G ou en 5G sont une bonne alternative. Voici notre comparatif des meilleures box internet en 5G.

item.title: Moon flyby shatters Apollo 13’s distance record, and also includes a solar eclipse
item.description: Artemis II is headed back to Earth after an intense observation period of the moon that lasted seven hours. After traveling deeper into space than any other humans, the Artemis II astronauts pointed their moonship toward home Monday night, wrapping up a lunar cruise that revealed views of the far side never beheld by eyes until now.Their flyby of the moon — NASA’s first return since the Apollo era — even included some celestial sightseeing besides yielding rich science. It was a significant step toward landing boot prints near the moon’s south pole in just two years.A total solar eclipse greet...
